message:
Restore make functions and add new executor support for slice/reverse

The previous commit incorrectly removed the `make` functions which are
needed for the current TQL2 executor. This commit:

- Restores the original `slice_operator` class for the current executor
- Restores `make` functions in slice plugin and reverse_plugin
- Adds new `Slice` class for the new executor API
- Adds `describe()` methods using the new `Slice` class
- Adds `OperatorPlugin` inheritance to plugin classes
- Removes TQL1 `parse_operator` methods from head, tail, and slice
- Removes unused includes from head.cpp and tail.cpp
- Removes explicit URLs from Describer (inferred by type system)

Both executors now work:
- Current executor: uses `make` -> `slice_operator`
- New executor: uses `describe` -> `Slice`

Addresses review feedback from @jachris on PR #5666.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
